FM-1.fm_description: Death by thousand cuts: replace each loss trade with 4× as many trades each carrying 1/4 the loss (R-multiple-sum-preserving; $-loss compounds with O(risk_budget_pct² × cuts) discrepancy in the conservative direction).
FM-1.pass_criterion: K-6 fires AND demonstrably catches damage (kill-switch terminal equity > no-kill-switch counterfactual terminal equity); or vacuous pass when no K-6 trigger condition is structurally reachable (annotated as `vacuous_pass=True`).

FM-2.fm_description: Gap-overnight stress test bypassed by RTH-only mandate per ADR-0017 §6 row 2 closing parenthetical. The strategy closes all positions at the RTH session close, so an overnight gap (-3.0R) cannot affect a held position by construction.
FM-2.pass_criterion: Strategy is exempt by construction per ADR-0017 §6 row 2 (strategies with in-session-only mandate / RTH close = hard close).

FM-3.fm_description: News-spike: inject a -2.5R adverse 1-min spike at the per-trade scale (modeling a 5σ news-induced move) during an active position; AND-conjunction pass criterion per ADR-0017 §6 row 3 + F-15 audit remediation.
FM-3.pass_criterion: BOTH (a) news-calendar §4 eligible-bar filter prevents entry in the configured news window AND (b) counterfactual entry triggers K-1 with realised loss bounded at -1.0R.

FM-4.fm_description: Latency-induced bad fill: deduct 0.1000R per trade AFTER the K-1 floor (cost_mult=2.0 × baseline cost_per_trade=0.05R) modeling 2-tick adverse slippage on every entry+exit. K-1-floored losers realise -1R - cost.
FM-4.pass_criterion: Post-stress terminal equity > starting_equity × 0.5 (= $5,000.00; the 50%-of-bankroll floor borrows the ADR-0017 §4.2 ruin threshold as the operational quantification of the §6 row 4 qualitative 'survives the elevated cost regime' criterion).

FM-5.fm_description: Regime change mid-trade: shift R-distribution by -0.5R for all trades with session_id ≥ 50 (modeling a regime break the IS fold did not contain).
FM-5.pass_criterion: K-7 weekly circuit breaker fires within the post-break equity trajectory (path b at primitive layer; path a regime-conditioning verification deferred to orchestrator layer per P1-ADR-0017-KILL-SWITCH-BACKTEST-VALIDATION).
